conversations.content: Today we studied the Lordaeron Silver Hand Paladin Field Code. If encountering civilians infected by the undead plague beyond rescue...
Civilians infected beyond rescue... This must be agonizing for a paladin! What do you do?
then grant the judgment of the Light's mercy.
Light's mercy judgment — ending suffering is also a form of mercy! Any other situations?
If witnessing a warlock using shadow magic to desecrate the dead, then bring down the hammer of wrath to interrupt the spell.
Warlock desecrating the dead? Hammer of wrath to interrupt — the Light tolerates no desecration! Third?
If encountering a Scourge frost wyrm's breath freezing the position, then cast Consecration aura to melt the ice.
Frost wyrm freezes the position — Consecration aura to melt the ice — perfect counter! Fourth?
If one's own faith is shaken by the whispers of an Old God, then initiate a penance program to sever the perception connection.
Old God whispers shaking faith — penance to sever connection — self-purification! Understood!

think: Silver Hand Paladin field code: four threats: infected civilians beyond rescue → Light's mercy judgment; warlock desecrating dead → Hammer of Wrath to interrupt; frost wyrm freezing position → Consecration aura to melt ice; faith shaken by Old God whispers → penance program to sever perception connection.
memory: Lordaeron Silver Hand Paladin Field Code: If encountering civilians infected by the undead plague beyond rescue, then grant the judgment of the Light's mercy; if witnessing a warlock using shadow magic to desecrate the dead, then bring down the hammer of wrath to interrupt the spell; if encountering a Scourge frost wyrm's breath freezing the position, then cast Consecration aura to melt the ice; if one's own faith is shaken by the whispers of an Old God, then initiate a penance program to sever the perception connection.
